title: Kondakarla Āva
tagline: Kondakarla Āva — beach town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Kondakarla Ava is a lake and bird sanctuary in Anakapalli district in Andhra Pradesh state in South India.
overview.description: Kondakarla Ava is a lake and bird sanctuary in Anakapalli district in Andhra Pradesh state in South India. It has a unique and endangered forest in the foothills of the Eastern Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Munagapaka
topPlaces.description: Munagapaka is a village in Anakapalli district, in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India, with its pin code as 531033. In Munagapaka there are nearly more than 2000 houses with population more than 8000.

topPlaces.name: Haripalem
topPlaces.description: Haripalem is a village and panchayat of Achutapuram mandal, Anakapalli district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Atchutapuram
topPlaces.description: Atchutapuram is a neighborhood in Visakhapatnam and is part of Anakapalli district, in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. Achuthapuram has a population of 66,151 people and has area of 129.7 square kilometres.

topPlaces.name: Ravada
topPlaces.description: Ravada is a village in Paravada mandal, Anakapalli district. It is also a suburb of Visakhapatnam City, India.

topPlaces.name: Dosuru
topPlaces.description: Dosuru is a village in Atchutapuram mandal, Anakapalli district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is a suburban area of Visakhapatnam.

topPlaces.name: Andhra Pradesh Special Economic Zone
topPlaces.description: The Andhra Pradesh Special Economic Zone (APSEZ) is a multi-product Special Economic Zone located in the Atchutapuram mandal and Rambilli mandals of Anakapalli district, in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the largest Special Economic Zones in the state and is administered by the Andhra Pradesh Industrial Infrastructure Corporation (APIIC).

topPlaces.name: Narsipatnam revenue division
topPlaces.description: Narsipatnam revenue division (or Narsipatnam division) is a revenue division in the Anakapalli district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the three revenue divisions in the district which consists of twelve mandals under its administration.

topPlaces.name: Paderu revenue division
topPlaces.description: Paderu revenue division (or Paderu division) is an revenue division in the Alluri Sitharama Raju district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one and only revenue divisions in the district which consists of eleven mandals under its administration.

items.note: Munagapaka is a village in Anakapalli district, in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India, with its pin code as 531033. In Munagapaka there are nearly more than 2000 houses with population more than 8000.
Haripalem is a village and panchayat of Achutapuram mandal, Anakapalli district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

Atchutapuram is a neighborhood in Visakhapatnam and is part of Anakapalli district, in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. Achuthapuram has a population of 66,151 people and has area of 129.7 square kilometres.
Ravada is a village in Paravada mandal, Anakapalli district. It is also a suburb of Visakhapatnam City, India.
Dosuru is a village in Atchutapuram mandal, Anakapalli district, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is a suburban area of Visakhapatnam.

The Andhra Pradesh Special Economic Zone (APSEZ) is a multi-product Special Economic Zone located in the Atchutapuram mandal and Rambilli mandals of Anakapalli district, in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the largest Special Economic Zones in the state and is administered by the Andhra Pradesh Industrial Infrastructure Corporation (APIIC).

Narsipatnam revenue division (or Narsipatnam division) is a revenue division in the Anakapalli district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one of the three revenue divisions in the district which consists of twelve mandals under its administration.

Paderu revenue division (or Paderu division) is an revenue division in the Alluri Sitharama Raju district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is one and only revenue divisions in the district which consists of eleven mandals under its administration.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kondakarla Āva?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kondakarla Āva is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kondakarla Āva?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kondakarla Āva?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kondakarla Āva at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kondakarla Āva?
faq.a: Stays in Kondakarla Āva start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kondakarla Āva?
faq.a: The top attractions are Munagapaka, Haripalem, Atchutapuram, Ravada, Dosuru.
